name: Cadoom
short_description: Be a true warrior in this FPS doom clone game. Destroy evil enemies and find cakes at every level to finish game
detailed_description:
STORY:


Player controls Cadoom character in this retro style doom clone FPS shooter. Mission is to find cake in 8 different levels. Finding cake finish levels. But mission isnt easy. There are several different and dangerous enemies like slow Crawler, fast flying insects and big enermous and dangerous monster. Player can collect and use different weapons, like rocket weapon, machine gun, shotgun, grenade launcher etc. Also player can pick up different items like more health, shield which protect limited time and increase player damage

FEATURES:

- 8 levels with steam achievements
- Different weapons like: machinegun,shotgun, grenade launcher, laser weapon, rocket launcher.
- Collect ammo pick-ups
- Collect health pick ups, shield picuk ups and damage increase pickups
- Different enemies:
- Crawlers slow walking enemies
- Insects. Fast flying enemies
- Monster. Big and dangerous, but slow enemies
- Find cake at every level to finish level
